programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a pediatric dentist is found dead, police uncover a complex plot and their suspect leads investigators on an international manhunt; the lead detective speaks out for the first time.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A devoted mother is found shot to death in her minivan; the case stays cold until old memories resurface and new revelations come to light, dividing her Florida family.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When 16-year-old Britney Ujlaky disappears, a small town in Nevada bands together to track down a potential suspect - an unknown cowboy; Soon, their focus turns to someone much closer to Britney.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A teenager's life is turned upside down by a shocking discovery as what seems like a fatal accident reveals itself to be something much more disturbing.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Recently uncovered pages from John Hinckley Jr.'s diary, which he began writing after he was arrested for trying to assassinate President Ronald Reagan; an interview with the officer who questioned Hinckley after the attempted assassination.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A community comes together to search for a young woman who goes missing from a Halloween party.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man steals millions of dollars by conning numerous women and businesses over 25 years; one woman brings together a group of his victims to hold him accountable and make him face justice.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After finding his wife and two children dead, a former Indiana state trooper spends 13 years trying to clear his name.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Using DNA testing and a photographer's diary, a retired detective reopens a cold case involving the death of a beautiful young mother.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A car belonging to a missing man erupts in a blaze, leading to clues regarding his whereabouts.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Convicted murderer Drew Peterson speaks out about the murder of his third wife and the disappearance of his fourth wife in his first network TV interview in more than a decade; insiders close to the case speak out, including Stacy Peterson's sister.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The discovery of a 19-year-old's car abandoned on a bridge in New Jersey turns into a missing person case that evolves into a monthslong homicide investigation; police discover a plot involving money, close friends and a fatal betrayal.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A 21-year-old college senior is shot and killed in a public park just months before her graduation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Months after a woman and her husband come down with the same mysterious illness, the woman dies after experiencing the same symptoms; old recordings reveal the twisted truth about her demise.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Nearly 40 years after a high school senior is found stabbed to death in her car after visiting the mall days before Christmas, investigators identify the killer.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Robert Davis, who was convicted of murdering a woman and her son, claims his confession was coerced and tries to prove he is innocent.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After a plastic surgeon and local musician is murdered in his Asheville, N.C., home, investigators uncover a trail of clues pointing to an unlikely killer; new details emerge from exclusive TV interviews with insiders close to the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman is found murdered after her close friend hears her screaming on the phone; the mysterious death of her boyfriend's twin brother leads investigators to a suspect.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Eleven years after Connecticut mother Donna Palomba is raped in her home, investigators finally track down her attacker; Donna speaks out about the latest developments in the case, including her fight to keep her assailant from walking free.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After a nurse and mother-of-three is murdered inside her Illinois home, investigators uncover security camera footage that could be key to solving the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A pregnant woman vanishes before her own baby shower and her worried family raises the alarm; detectives unravel a chilling mystery.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An investigation into the poisoning of Wisconsin mother-of-two Julie Jensen takes a surprising turn when detectives learn that she wrote a letter days before her death pointing to a possible suspect.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Years after a Montana man is found dead, his son opens up a box of case files to find out what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, the insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Shamaia Smith disappeared from the strip club she worked at in East Hartford, CT. Police look at various customers of the strip club, but focus on local businessman Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide _ but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months passed, then years, and the crime was never solved. Then Kathleen's family hired a private investigator, who discovered her diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed, and his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 20, 2001, Carrie Nelson, then 20, was beaten to death while working alone in a park office. The case went unsolved for six years until May 2007 when police found a match with DNA samples gathered from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one person, a suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The sensitive nose of a forensic examiner sniffs out murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. The case stalls for more than a year, and then investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb ripped through a rural home, police had no idea who was responsible. A lot number on a 9-volt battery and the remnants of a mailing label found on a hard drive led investigators to who sent the bomb and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings which has killed 2 and injured one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation into a brutal attack on two boys near a pond relies on evidence fished out of the murky water. It was the first case where Diatom evidence was used to place a suspect at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death, and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation of a discarded sleeping bag, containing bloody sneakers and a purse, leads police to the body of a young woman. A mark found on the victim's body would enable police to track the killer, Jesse Pratt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort focused law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appeared to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence pointed to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Deadly Knowledge The investigation into a missing college coed leads police to discover that, unbeknownst to her friends, she lived a bizarre double life, attending school by day and working as a call-girl by night. When her body is found, investigators gather evidence that implicates her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Relates the story of Paul Kenneth Keller, a serial arsonist responsible for several fires that caused millions of dollars worth of property damage and the deaths of three people. More than 75 Seattle-area arsons are probed before he was discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. The killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind _ tiny but unmistakable clues which pointed to him and him alone.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was 1957, and California police were searching for a man who had committed several crimes in one night, including murder. They followed thousands of leads but eventually the case turned cold. Almost 50 years later, with the help of advances in computer technology and handwriting analysis, investigators proved an old adage: You can run, but you can't hide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate tycoon went missing, it appeared to be foul play. In his will, he left instructions regarding what was to happen if he died under violent circumstances_which were carried out after a hiker came across a bullet-ridden skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, funeral director Lonnie Turner, Sr. was found shot to death. His son Lonnie Jr. became the prime suspect, particularly after it was discovered that the murder was committed with his gun. However, he had an alibi for the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of an attractive young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier, after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 2-year-old boy's brain seizures and breathing problems baffle doctors until they learn the mother exhibits signs of Munchausen syndrome by proxy, a rare condition that led her to physically abuse her son and contributed to her daughter's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Darlene VanderGiesen received threatening emails and then disappeared. Tracking the source of the emails led police to the home of Daphne Wright, where they believe a murder was committed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a car was found in a drainage ditch with two bodies inside, a fingertip torn from a latex glove would point investigators to both the crime scene and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives learn that a genetic disorder caused the deaths of a woman's children, resulting in an overturned conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After shooting his victims in the head, the killer staged the scene, placed the incriminating evidence into a plastic bag and tossed it into the river.¾

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an off-duty policeman was shot dead, his fellow officers were determined to solve the crime. They needed clues to find the killer, and they discovered them in tiny fibers and an asthma inhaler.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends were devastated but they had no proof of foul play.¾

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, Lisa Manderach and her daughter Devon left their Pennsylvania home to go shopping, but didn't return home. Lisa's husband Jimmy called police in a panic to report their disappearance and directed them to a nearby shopping center.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a prosecutor discovers evidence linking a habitual drunk driver to a hit-and-run in which a child is killed, he combines the talents of an accident reconstruction expert with a video specialist. This case was the first in which video in the courtroom withstood an appeal, and helped make 'video testimony' viable in other cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The founder of American Atheists disappeared in 1995 along with one of her sons and granddaughter, along with $500,000 in gold coins. The police homed in on several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Security cameras in a casino tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police get a clue about a couple who disappeared on Memorial Day weekend during an in-progress robbery. The evidence found solves a brutal crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside--physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest running true crime series in television history, a serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Employing a range of forensic techniques, investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend's house. She was never seen or heard from again. Rose's disappearance remained a mystery, until a tiny clue found years later revealed a tragic tale of drugs, romance and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. Police were suspicious of a suspect who reported a fire in his car. Two tiny drops of blood were found in the interior. A tiny clue inside the suspect's watchband helped solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A retired police officer is discovered in his bed, dead from a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife first says the motive was robbery. Then she tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence but was sentenced to 25 years in prison. He turned to the law books in the prison library and TV about forensic science and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, 16-month-old Anne Grace Gimmenstad became very ill, was rushed to the hospital and died within two weeks. Following extensive medical examinations, it was determined that Anna had been the victim of the deadly bacteria E.coli.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a tragic twist of fate, just days after the woman sold her home and moved to a modest trailer, a fire took both the trailer and her life. But the autopsy proved this was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How scientists solved a 1992 murder case involving cremation. It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy evidence of foul play. But the coroner who performed the autopsy on the body found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home and then the killer sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend Janet Haynes.¾

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Forensic scientists work with the only clue recovered from a multiple-victim shooting: a 12-gauge shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon in order to trace it to its owner.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college co-ed vanished without a trace, her fellow students were concerned about her safety and their own.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1983, two young boys were found tied and murdered with similar wounds within three months of each other in two Nebraska towns. The rope used to tie the boys was unique. Another clue turned up when one of the boy's brother was hypnotized and remembered a uniformed man in a tan car.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Christmas eve 2005, the corpse of a black male is found burning near Baltimore. He's eventually identified as 26-year-old Wesley Person. Distinctive building materials from the 1930s found near the body play a crucial role in solving this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Michigan State University grad student disappeared and was presumed dead. With the help of a professor of geological sciences, police hoped to get the 'dirt' on her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Native American woman was brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, and the crime scene was rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, police discover that a wound sustained by the grieving widow may have been self-inflicted. They turn to science to help unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder investigation in St. Petersburg, Florida, crosses jurisdictions from New York and Jamaica. The police rely on cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to link a suspect to a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered in the garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology to identify the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a small, quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy did not return home as planned. The investigation revealed some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen. It was the only forensic evidence detectives had. But would it be enough for them to find him?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her home, and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals, and he was determined find out what the dogs had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When court clerk Peter Porco doesn't report to his work in November 2004, a courts officer is ordered to the Porcos' family home in Bethlehem, NY.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of employees' jobs. Forensic investigators must determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error, or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Digital enhancement of security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. When investigators suspect the crimes are not random, they fear a serial killer may be on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The decade-old murder of a young Texas housewife is investigated.

programme.title: Revelation
programme.desc: Question a once-protected priest and learn how victims are fighting back.

programme.title: Revelation
programme.desc: Learn how a priest preyed on children even after his double life was exposed.

programme.title: Revelation
programme.desc: Unmask the officials who aided predators and discover chilling church secrets.

programme.desc: Gasp at a vicious fraudster with a diabolical method of covering his tracks.

programme.title: Fred Dinenages: Murder Casebook Files
programme.desc: Bear witness to the murderous rampage of a teenager with a taste for poison.

programme.desc: Evaluate a fatal stabbing case in which CCTV helped identify the assailants.

programme.desc: Explore the vile case of two brutal drug-fuelled killers turned arsonists.

programme.desc: Find out if a collision and a parking lot run-in caused two separate tragedies.

programme.title: Cause of Death
programme.desc: Learn if a rare disease killed a man and if an operation ended another’s life.

programme.title: Cause of Death
programme.desc: Deduce what killed a healthy young man and a recently vaccinated office worker.

programme.title: Cause of Death
programme.desc: Ascertain what felled an active mom and one of Dr. Adeley’s former colleagues.

programme.title: Cause of Death
programme.desc: Look at a young man’s death and determine if suicide could have been the cause.

programme.title: Cause of Death
programme.desc: Unearth a surprising cause in the death of a young woman at a music festival.

programme.desc: A heartbreak sends a vivacious mother of seven into the arms of a wealthy gentleman. After nearly a decade together, she discovers the monster under the mask, a notorious gang leader being hunted by the FBI leaving a trail of bodies behind him.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: After a stint of living on the streets, a teenage girl finally finds security in the arms of her new boyfriend. In return, she�d do anything for him, but when a small favor takes a deadly turn, she loses her friend and her freedom, all for her man.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: A woman is found dead from multiple gunshot wounds and detectives look to her abusive ex-boyfriend straightaway. As the investigation develops, a mysterious man enters the picture, and they suddenly find themselves caught between two suspects.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter are found stabbed the day after Thanksgiving, detectives eye her estranged husband and new boyfriend. The investigation soon leads them to hair-raising footage that exposes the killer they�ve been looking for all along.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.desc: Quinn and Vince investigate the death of a man found lying in the leaves with a gunshot wound to his torso, but as they look into it, they learn about a second victim. To find the killer, they'll have to unravel a series of carjackings and stories.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.desc: The sexual assault and murder of a 14-year-old girl in Southwest Atlanta has been on ice since �95, but a new lead sends Quinn and Vince hunting for suspects. Though as the leads once again cool, finding the killer may mean seeking inside help.

programme.title: Payback
programme.desc: After a gunshot victim is identified as a recent suspect in an earlier killing, Northern Virginia police must determine if the crimes are somehow connected, and if the deaths are random acts of violence or a more likely act of revenge.

programme.title: Sins of the City

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead inside a motel room, police quickly learn she was an escort. They have multiple suspects, from her last client to her latest boyfriend. But soon, the investigation will put them on the trail of a serial killer instead.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: After Hurricane Sandy hits New York, a missing man�s body is found buried on the beach � but he�s not a victim of the storm. Was he killed by a looter in the post-hurricane chaos? Or was the disaster used as cover for a killer with personal motive?

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: When a young beauty catches the eye of a popular Jamaican dancehall DJ, he gives her a life of luxury. In return, she gives him undying loyalty and love. But when other women start vying for his attention, she risks it all.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A beautiful, young woman has the world at her fingertips until a charming, bad boy sweeps her off her feet.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A high school freshman falls in love for the first time when she meets an edgy troublemaker. She becomes desperate to show him her love has no bounds - but soon, she will discover there’s a fine line between proving your love and going too far…

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: A beloved country boy is found dead in his home. His family believes they know who did it. But, when a witness reveals a sordid tale of jealousy and vengeance, detectives must piece together the evidence to find out who really pulled the trigger.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: After escaping a bad relationship, a young woman thinks she finally found Mr. Right. But soon, she realizes her new man is actually worse than her ex.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A beautiful young bank teller falls head over heels for a starving musician. Under his spell, she becomes willing to risk it all.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A young woman committed to her faith is lured in by the idea of holy matrimony. However, she soon learns that her “man of God” is no saint, and his violent temper leads her down a road of crime, abuse and destruction.

programme.title: First Comes Loves, Then Comes Murder
programme.desc: A devoted wife evades death when the man her husband hires to kill her has a change of heart.

programme.title: Greed
programme.desc: When interior decorator Zuri Maxwell meets handsome benefactor and entrepreneur Godfrey Anderson, she compromises the values and morals that should guide her in an effort to be part of the moneyed world she so desperately wants to enter.

programme.title: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: Ripped from the true crime files of Fatal Attraction, a young woman fights for her life after being kidnapped by her obsessive ex-boyfriend, while her family will stop at nothing to find her.

programme.title: Loved to Death
programme.desc: When a woman finds her new love, their romance is cut short by her ex who refuses to let go.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: A single mother seems happy and in love, but then, she disappears without a trace. Rumors swirl that a troubled past has returned to haunt her, but the truth, which has forced her children to bare a horrible secret, is even more shocking.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction-Dupe
programme.desc: When a young mother is gunned down outside her apartment, police immediately have lots of questions. The investigation reveals several possible suspects: her current and previous beaus, and multiple women who may be angry over her pregnancy.

programme.title: El de los lentes Carrera
programme.desc: En su búsqueda de justicia, Ángel se enfrentará no solo a traiciones y enemigos implacables, sino a fuerzas peligrosas que desafiarán todo en su vida.

programme.title: El de los lentes Carrera
programme.desc: Tras un periodo de estar retirado, Ángel del Villar retorna a las andadas cuando un grupo de sicarios busca matarlo sin motivo aparente.

programme.title: El de los lentes Carrera
programme.desc: Después de un brutal enfrentamiento con Manuel, conocido como El Ondeado, Ángel del Villar queda al borde de la muerte. Mientras él lucha por sobrevivir a sus heridas, Karina y Monserrat caen en las garras de El Belicón, quien ha logrado tomar el control absoluto de la Federación, desatando una nueva era de terror. Pero el mayor peligro aún está por llegar. El Belicón revela su arma secreta: El Centinela, una máquina de combate humana, imparable y letal.

programme.title: Amor a fuego lento
programme.desc: Debido al fallecimiento de su madre, un famoso chef regresa de mala gana a su pequeña ciudad natal. Mientras redescubre su amor por la cocina, se reencuentra con un viejo amor que está a punto de casarse.

programme.title: Las movidas de Juan Pérez
programme.desc: Juan Pérez es borracho, parrandero y jugador, pero sobre todo mujeriego. Tal es su debilidad por el sexo femenino que está casado tres veces para satisfacer cada una de sus facetas como macho.

programme.title: El Cholo
programme.desc: Un humilde vendedor de tacos apodado El Sheik, decide unirse a una pandilla para rescatar a Jade que ha sido secuestrada por un conocido padrote.

programme.title: Fotografiando la muerte
programme.desc: Un atractivo fotógrafo promete a las mujeres tomarles fotografías, pero ellas no saben que su verdadero motivo es siniestro y sádico.

programme.title: A ellas les gustan mayores
programme.desc: Ricardo está casado con Miranda, una bella mujer de afortunada posición social. Sin embargo, Ricardo la engaña con una mujer más joven que él.

programme.title: Cigarrito Bañado
programme.desc: Lucio huye de una deuda y de un amigo peligroso. En el camino conoce a Ximena, una mujer que seduce a los hombres y luego les roba el dinero.

programme.title: Cometa
programme.desc: Un chico pierde todas las cosas que lo motivan a vivir. Se ha quedado sin trabajo, casa y familia, pero en su recorrido por las calles se encuentra a Cometa, un perro callejero.

programme.title: Las viejas del sicario
programme.desc: Una película de acción de narcos.

programme.title: Mariachi gringo
programme.desc: Edward, un apasionado por la música mexicana, se siente atrapado en la rutina de la pequeña ciudad donde reside. Con el propósito de huir de todo, Edward se muda a México para convertirse en un mariachi.

programme.title: Soy de la frontera verde
programme.desc: Don Hugo un poderoso narcotraficante, muere en circunstacias muy extrañas, aunque todo indica que lo envenenaron. Su hija, doña Fernanda Morales, no dejará cabos sueltos y vengará la muerte de su padre encontrando al culpable.

programme.title: Un ángel en peligro
programme.desc: La felicidad de una familia se quiebra cuando secuestran a su hija. Al mismo tiempo, se descubrirá la red de engaños entre su sobrino y su esposa, además de un nexo con un narcotraficante.

programme.title: A ellas les gustan mayores
programme.desc: Ricardo está casado con Miranda, una bella mujer de afortunada posición social. Sin embargo, Ricardo la engaña con una mujer más joven que él.

programme.title: Cigarrito Bañado
programme.desc: Lucio huye de una deuda y de un amigo peligroso. En el camino conoce a Ximena, una mujer que seduce a los hombres y luego les roba el dinero.

programme.title: Cometa
programme.desc: Un chico pierde todas las cosas que lo motivan a vivir. Se ha quedado sin trabajo, casa y familia, pero en su recorrido por las calles se encuentra a Cometa, un perro callejero.

programme.title: Las viejas del sicario
programme.desc: Una película de acción de narcos.

programme.title: A ellas les gustan mayores
programme.desc: Ricardo está casado con Miranda, una bella mujer de afortunada posición social. Sin embargo, Ricardo la engaña con una mujer más joven que él.

programme.title: Moisés y los diez mandamientos
programme.desc: La historia de Moisés desde su nacimiento y llegada a manos de la princesa Henutmire hasta llevar a su pueblo a la Tierra Prometida. Su crianza como un verdadero príncipe egipcio junto a su tío Ramsés.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Jade aún no puede creer que va a tener un bebé de Said, cuando él se entera, su felicidad no tiene límites y promete que en 40 días le quitará al bebé. Ella espanta a todas sus pretendientes.

programme.title: Eres mi estrella
programme.desc: La compañía que maneja el grupo ídolo ANJELL insiste en contratar un nuevo cantante porque la voz del cantante principal Tae Kyung, ya no es la misma.

programme.title: Génesis
programme.desc: Adaptación de uno de los libros más reconocidos de la Biblia, que aborda la historia del origen de la humanidad, invitando a entender el presente, volviendo al principio de todo. La caída de Lucifer, la vida de Adán y Eva, Noé y el diluvio, y otros.

programme.title: Señora del Destino
programme.desc: María do Carmo es una madre de cinco hijos que triunfó en la vida con mucha lucha y tesón, pero que todavía tendrá una batalla que luchar: obtener el cariño de su hija quien fue secuestrada cuando era una recién nacida.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Selim pide la mano de Busra para cuidar su reputación, pero le confiesa a sus padres que Busra y Orhan han tenido intimidad. Castigan a Busra, y ella busca a Orhan, pero él no contesta sus llamadas.

programme.title: El laberinto de Alicia
programme.desc: Alicia Vega, psicóloga del colegio Los Ángeles, especialista en prevención y tratamiento de abusos sexuales a menores, inicia una investigación cuando Valentina, una niña adorable y frágil, parece estar en la mira de un abusador.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: El amor de Said por Jade es tan grande que le perdona todo y la deja entrar de nuevo a la casa. Pasa el tiempo y Khadija, la hija de ambos, tiene diez años. Said luce enamorado, Jade resignada.

programme.title: Eres mi estrella
programme.desc: La compañía que maneja el grupo ídolo ANJELL insiste en contratar un nuevo cantante porque la voz del cantante principal Tae Kyung, ya no es la misma.

programme.title: Génesis
programme.desc: Adaptación de uno de los libros más reconocidos de la Biblia, que aborda la historia del origen de la humanidad, invitando a entender el presente, volviendo al principio de todo. La caída de Lucifer, la vida de Adán y Eva, Noé y el diluvio, y otros.

programme.title: Señora del Destino

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Orhan felicita a Büsra por su compromiso con Selim y le pide que ya no lo contacte. Cüneyt recibe otro aviso de cobranza. Kadir le pide ayuda a Öyk. Büsra va a casa de Azra para pedirle trabajo una vez más. El señor Fevzi llega a la entrevista.

programme.title: Destinos cruzados
programme.desc: Toprak despierta de un coma tras cinco años sin recordar nada de su pasado, y regresa a una familia que no reconoce, incluida su prometida de toda la vida y un niño que vive con él. Sin embargo, su amnesia lo mantiene en una incertidumbre constante.
